summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Servall Hiring OS. Backend APIs working perfectly with 100% success rate. Frontend-backend integration fully functional. All core workflows tested successfully including login, navigation, CRUD operations, and lead pipeline management.

ui_bugs.issue: Chart width/height warnings in console - charts not rendering properly due to container sizing
ui_bugs.impact: Visual only - charts show warnings but don't break functionality

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent accessibility

passed_tests: Admin login with admin@servall.com / ServallAdmin@123 - dashboard loads with stats
Navigation to all pages (Dashboard, Branches, Jobs, Tasks, Leads Pipeline, Users, Talent Intel, Employees)
Create lead functionality - modal opens, form submission works, lead appears in pipeline
Frontend-backend API integration - all API calls successful (200 status codes)
Lead pipeline stage management - new leads created successfully
Dashboard stats display correctly showing pipeline distribution
Branch management - Add Branch modal opens with proper form fields
Auto-created tasks visible after job creation workflow
Talent Intelligence page loads and displays data
JWT Bearer token authentication working properly
CORS configuration working for cross-origin requests
All CRUD operations via API endpoints
action_item_for_main_agent: OPTIONAL: Fix chart container sizing issues causing width/height warnings. Add aria-describedby attributes to modal dialogs for better accessibility. These are minor issues that don't affect core functionality.
